channel.title: Learning on Kelly and Coffee
channel.description: Recent content in Learning on Kelly and Coffee

item.title: Studying While Working Full-Time
item.description: I’ve recently changed employer; I swapped insurance for transport. I went from MS Amlin to Lineas; I now help drive a ‘Freight Force’. Lineas is fairly scattered right now; but it offers me so much potential growth. A new job also means learning new things; a lot of new things.
